items.title: USN-8256-1: opam vulnerability
items.summary:
Andrew Nesbitt discovered that opam did not properly validate file
destination paths in package install files. An attacker could use this
issue to bypass sandbox protections and write files to arbitrary locations,
possibly leading to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Europol and partners track down 45 forcibly transferred Ukrainian children

In total, information about 45 children was uncovered and shared with Ukrainian authorities to assist their ongoing investigations.

items.title: Europol-supported global operation targets over 75 000 users engaged in DDoS attacks

With over 75 000 warning emails and letters being sent to identified criminal users and 4 arrests, the action week also led to the takedown of 53 domains  and the issuing of  25 search warrants.

items.title: Leading Balkan Cartel member arrested in Montenegro

This action day resulted in the arrest of twelve suspects (four in Germany), including a High Value Target (HVT) apprehended in Montenegro.
